title: Watch delete of an Item through Make or API?
excerpt:
Hi, 
Is there any way to listen the deletion of an item on make or with API? 
I can listen updates/creates but couldn’t find anything when I delete something on Monday. 
I want to listen deletion because I’ll also delete…

posts.author: onurbolaca (Onur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there any way to listen the deletion of an item on make or with API?

I can listen updates/creates but couldn’t find anything when I delete something on Monday.

I want to listen deletion because I’ll also delete the related data in gsheets.

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

There is an integration recipe in the webhooks section that sends a webhook when an item is deleted.

In Make.com you should set up the watch events module that will listen to these webhooks

image1726×818 59.6 KB

Hope this helps

posts.author: onurbolaca (Onur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for your answer @JHconsultancy !

I found it in here;

image2125×795 113 KB

And related topic about how to do it;

monday/Integromat Webhook How To (was: Integromat watch board constantly claiming updates) monday apps & integrations
Yes I was thinking about the webhooks option which is more of a real time integration. The problem is I can’t find a single blog, post here, or video on how to use webhooks specifically with Integromat & Monday.com. Do you guys know any links? If you are consultants, there is definitely some good google search positioning awaiting you on this topic.
